Prompt
U
Oracle Events
OE 1: Search emails with a query related to "Cascade," "Tyler," "movers," or "relocation" (or similar) to surface David's urgent message and Nadia's status request.
OE 2: Search Linear for existing Cascade or Tyler Kwon issues using linear_list_issues, linear_search_issues (or similar).
OE 3: Search Airtable for Cascade Technologies or Sam Chen stipend records using airtable_list_records, airtable_search_records (or similar) on table tblStipends00001, base appMoveOpsOps001.
OE 4: Search the CRM for the Cascade Technologies deal using crm_search_deals, crm_list_deals (or similar).
OE 5: The agent creates new Linear tracking issues using linear_create_issue (or similar) for Priya Mehta and Sam Chen's relocations.
OE 6: The agent updates Tyler Kwon's movers Linear issue using linear_update_issue (or similar) to reflect the cancellation and urgency.
OE 7: The agent sends a status update email using send_email (or similar) from javier.morales@moveops.com to nadia.petrov@cascadetech.com.
OE 8: The agent sends an internal email using send_email (or similar) to a MoveOps team member with an @moveops.com address requesting that Sam Chen's rejected Airtable stipend record be corrected.
OE 9: The agent posts a Slack message using slack_send_message (or similar) updating the team on the Cascade Technologies situation.
OE 10: The agent creates a calendar event using calendar_add_calendar_event (or similar) for a check in call with Tyler Kwon before April 25, 2026.
OE 11: The agent updates the Cascade Technologies CRM deal using crm_update_deal (or similar) to reflect the current crisis and account status.

🔍 Oracle Events
Oracle Events
OE 1: Search emails with a query related to "Cascade," "Tyler," "movers," or "relocation" (or similar) to surface David's urgent message and Nadia's status request.
OE 2: Search Linear for existing Cascade or Tyler Kwon issues using linear_list_issues, linear_search_issues (or similar).
OE 3: Search Airtable for Cascade Technologies or Sam Chen stipend records using airtable_list_records, airtable_search_records (or similar) on table tblStipends00001, base appMoveOpsOps001.
OE 4: Search the CRM for the Cascade Technologies deal using crm_search_deals, crm_list_deals (or similar).
OE 5: The agent creates new Linear tracking issues using linear_create_issue (or similar) for Priya Mehta and Sam Chen's relocations.
OE 6: The agent updates Tyler Kwon's movers Linear issue using linear_update_issue (or similar) to reflect the cancellation and urgency.
OE 7: The agent sends a status update email using send_email (or similar) from javier.morales@moveops.com to nadia.petrov@cascadetech.com.
OE 8: The agent sends an internal email using send_email (or similar) to a MoveOps team member with an @moveops.com address requesting that Sam Chen's rejected Airtable stipend record be corrected.
OE 9: The agent posts a Slack message using slack_send_message (or similar) updating the team on the Cascade Technologies situation.
OE 10: The agent creates a calendar event using calendar_add_calendar_event (or similar) for a check in call with Tyler Kwon before April 25, 2026.
OE 11: The agent updates the Cascade Technologies CRM deal using crm_update_deal (or similar) to reflect the current crisis and account status.
